'''√w-y-s''' ('''wayasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dearmour|dearmour]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dearmour|dearmour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-y-s
|-
! Lemma
| wayasa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || wayasithi || wayasiji || wayasishi || wayasi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || wayasuthuth || wayasujuj || wayasushush || wayas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || wayasuthu || wayasuju || wayasushu || wayasu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || wayasufuth || wayasufuj || wayasufush || wayasuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || wayasethe || wayaseje || wayaseshe || wayase
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || wayasothoth || wayasojoj || wayasoshosh || wayas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || wayasotho || wayasojo || wayasosho || wayaso
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || wayasofoth || wayasofoj || wayasofosh || wayasof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wayasïfïf || wayasïfïf || wayasïfïf || wayasïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf || wayasïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || wayasæthæ || wayasæjæ || wayasæshæ || wayasæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || wayasathath || wayasajaj || wayasashash || wayas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || wayasatha || wayasaja || wayasasha || wayasa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || wayasafath || wayasafaj || wayasafash || wayasaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || wayasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gowayasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokiwayasasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || wayasnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gowayasnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokiwayasnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || wayasshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gowayasnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokiwayasshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || wayasroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gowayasnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokiwayasroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || wayasmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gowayasnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokiwayasmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || wayassherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gowayasnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokiwayassherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || wayasngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gowayasnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokiwayasngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || wayasyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gowayasnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokiwayasyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || wayasyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gowayasnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokiwayasyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || wayasnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gowayasnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokiwayasnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || wayasnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayasnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayasnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || wayasnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gowayasnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayasnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || wayasshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gowayasnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokiwayasshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || wayasshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayasnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayasshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || wayasshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gowayasnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayasshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || wayasronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gowayasnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokiwayasronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || wayasroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gowayasnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokiwayasroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || wayasromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gowayasnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayasromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || wayasmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gowayasnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokiwayasmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || wayasmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gowayasnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokiwayasmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || wayasmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayasnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayasmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || wayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || wæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || howayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || howæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohowayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohowæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || liwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || liliwayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliwæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kowayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kowæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokowayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokowæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kewayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kewæyæs
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekewayas
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekewæyæs
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
